title: podman security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[5.6.0-9.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[6:5.6.0-9]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/3bf5313)
- fixes 'run 1.2.x upgrade throws error while using nocopy volume mount filesystem option - [RHEL 9.7]'
- Resolves: RHEL-132531

[6:5.6.0-8]
- rebuild for golang-1.25.3
- Resolves: RHEL-125711
full_text:
[5.6.0-9.0.1]
- Add devices on container startup, not on creation
- overlay: Put should ignore ENINVAL for Unmount [Orabug: 36234694]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117404]

[6:5.6.0-9]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v5.6-rhel
  (https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/3bf5313)
- fixes 'run 1.2.x upgrade throws error while using nocopy volume mount filesystem option - [RHEL 9.7]'
- Resolves: RHEL-132531

[6:5.6.0-8]
- rebuild for golang-1.25.3
- Resolves: RHEL-125711

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23325.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-58183.html
